Crystal detail — Calcium Oxalate
Envelope / dumbbell morphology
Count
23
crystals
Confidence
92%
model score
Risk
Moderate
flag
Morphology & significance
Envelope / dumbbell (Whewellite) — associated with hyperoxaluria and calcium kidney stones. Most common pathological urine crystal.
Recommended action
24-hour urine oxalate test, dietary review, and hydration counseling.
